caption:
Looking for things to do in Florida? 👀 This spot (plus 1,000+ more) is in my  Florida Travel Guide + Interactive Map perfect for weekend getaways, road trips, and exploring without hours of research and stress!
 💬 Comment “GUIDE” and I’ll send it to you! 

Crystal River is known as the Manatee Capital of the World! Hundreds of manatees congregate in the warm three first-magnitude springs in Crystal River, where the water maintains a constant temperature of 72 degrees throughout the year. 

There are many ways to see the manatees but some of my favorites are kayaking tours and snorkeling tours where you can actually get in the water with these gentle giants. 

If you don’t want to get wet, you can visit the Three Sisters Springs Boardwalk which have multiple view points along the boardwalk, great trails and a tram. 

If you do snorkel with the manatees be sure to maintain passive observation. Touching and chasing them is not allowed. But they are super curious creatures; don’t be surprised if they come up to you and start nuzzling you! 

Send to a friend that would love this! 

Three Sisters Springs 
917 Three Sisters Springs Trail, Crystal River,
FL 34429
